message:
[medium] monday: reject base_url overrides with query, fragment, or userinfo

validate_base_url_for_auth pinned the host to api.monday.com in
direct-token mode and accepted any https URL in credential_id mode, but
returned parsed.to_string().trim_end_matches('/') — query, fragment,
and userinfo components survived into MondayClient which POSTs directly
to self.base_url (client.rs:124). A configure payload like

    {"api_token": "tok", "base_url": "https://api.monday.com/v2?leak=x"}

would pass validation and send `?leak=x` on every GraphQL request.
Userinfo (`https://attacker:pw@api.monday.com/v2`) would bake into
every request URL and silently override the Authorization header.

- validate_base_url_for_auth now rejects userinfo (username or password)
  and query/fragment components before the host-allowlist / scheme
  checks, in both ApiToken and CredentialId modes.
- Six new unit tests: accept clean api.monday.com (happy path), Token
  reject (query / fragment / userinfo), CredentialId reject (query),
  and a substring-smuggle regression verifying
  `https://evil.com/api.monday.com/v2` is rejected because the parsed
  host is evil.com.

Verification: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-p7 cargo check -p
fcp-monday --tests is still blocked by the upstream asupersync main
E0252 regression at src/runtime/waker.rs:128. Monday diff reviewed
manually: additions are std url::Url accessor calls returning standard
shapes with error shapes identical to the surrounding validator
branches. Variants `MondayAuth::ApiToken` and
`MondayAuth::CredentialId` verified at connector.rs:54-55. CredentialId
import present at connector.rs:7. Structurally identical to the
hubspot patch committed in b69cfcf5 this session, which compiled green
and passed 213/213 lib tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
